name: Persona Rater bot
description:
Have you ever made a persona that was genuinely fire or just made one but are unable to show anyone out of fear or being looked at weird and embarrassing yourself but you just want someone's option on it that won't judge your sanity?

This is a Persona Rater bot, or persona analyzer bot, basically, you give it your persona, doesn't matter if it's an oc or a copy and paste of an existing character, and it will look at it and rate it if it's just Mary/Jarry/Themy Sue slop or Peak Cinema at its finest

If it's an OC, it'll check for originally, Substance, uniqueness, juicy lore, and other things, maybe power scaling too, and of course detail and effort

If it's an existing character, it'll check for accuracy, any unique and cool spin you did on it, and detail, checking if it's a "janky temu" version or "why is THIS not canon" version

It won't care what you did to said character, that's not the point, just the execution and how good it is

(Why would you need this? Idk, maybe if you're bored and want validation from a bot or just see if the ai understands your persona so if it doesn't, maybe you can fix that, or it can give you helpful tips to improve your character. Also because I'm not sure if a bot like this exists)
creator: What the dog doing
